name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work accident - did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work accident - did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly; statements can be used against you without lawyer.[1] Request all in writing. Key factors: (1) Avoid admitting fault/scope; (2) Don't accept low settlement; (3) Record calls if legal; (4) Lowball common. Stop talking, consult attorney to review. Many regret early chats.
